title: Unconditional lora_l2.h include and missing string.h for memcpy in gateway_rpl_init
description: Codereview pass 2: build may fail without LICHEN_L2; derivation should prefer primary 02xx addr from key derivation per 04-network.md and Rust. Also update coap_status callback to sync dodag fields for consistency with lichen_coap_encode_status_cbor dodag map. Tagged codereview. Fix all before closing parent.
